description: Ecota.co provides a ride-booking API that lets client applications create user accounts, manage payment methods, and estimate, reserve, and cancel rides. The published documentation is hosted on Apiary and describes a staging API endpoint.
summary: staging-ecotaco.com exposes one documented HTTP API for account, payment-method, address, promotional-code, and ride operations; it uses an application key for login/register requests and a user auth token for authenticated actions.
